domain: Trapani salt pan cascade (cascade of stepped ponds; passive sun+wind evaporate water; brine progressively concentrates; final crystal extracted)
specific_mechanism: Cascade of passive-environment-driven concentration stages, alternating with active pumping between ponds.
llm_application: PECDP: cascade alternating cheap passive refinement (regex, cache, constraint check) with expensive LLM stages; passive stages do free concentration, LLM stages do active lifts between ponds.
novelty_claim: Nemotron-Cascade 2 (2603.19220), Inter-Cascade (2509.22984), Chain-Based Distillation (2605.07783) are LLM-only cascades. PECDP integrates passive non-LLM environment refinement between LLM stages.
